creator: sjr@home.net
text:
There was a typo in the original bug report. Use this diff instead: --- www/en/y2kbug.sgml.orig Sun Aug 23 10:02:18 1998 +++ www/en/y2kbug.sgml Sun Aug 23 10:08:48 1998 @@ -104,10 +104,13 @@

Problematic applications

-

This section is currently a placeholder. As we become aware of - applications that have a Y2K problem we will note them here, and also - attempt to indicate which versions (if any) of the software are - fixed.

+
+
+
TkDesk 1.0 uses a hardcoded 19 in the file listing window. A + file with a date > 2000 is displayed with a year looking like + "191xx" where xx is the last two numbers of the real date.

More information
